author: gb9t
content: Iteration 5: amazon/ena.md committed (f8a9fbc, 221 lines). Covers Amazon ENA — every AWS EC2 instance NIC. Two-layer (ena_com HAL + ena_netdev), LLQ write-combined TX fast path, AENQ async events, watchdog reset, XDP, PTP. ~10K upstream lines covered. Rust translation: EnaDev<Phase> typed-state, exhaustive AENQ match, typed LlqWriter for WC MMIO. Grsec posture explicitly frames Nitro-as-adversary (parallel to confidential-computing host trust model): AENQ payload allowlist (5 groups only), req_id bounds-check, LLQ window pinned at probe, reset rate-limit, RSS key kernel CSPRNG. Next iteration target: drivers/net/ethernet/google/gve/ — Google's gVNIC NIC for GCP (every GCE VM with gVNIC has this).
